name: finsnap
description: Real-time financial snapshot for any US stock ticker. Fetches live price, key metrics, and recent news; synthesizes an AI-powered bull/bear analysis; delivers a rich Discord embed. No API key required for data — bring your own LLM key for AI synthesis.
author: Luke Stephens

examples.description: Single ticker snapshot with full AI analysis

examples.prompt: Quick snap on Apple and Microsoft
Is Tesla worth buying right now?
examples.description: AI bull/bear analysis with sentiment verdict

DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL.description: Discord webhook URL for push delivery. Leave blank to output to chat only.

FINSNAP_NEWS_COUNT.description: Number of news headlines to include (default: 3, max: 10)

FINSNAP_NO_AI.description: Set to true to skip AI synthesis and use rule-based analysis only
